items.title: FIFA Investigates Post-Match Scuffle Between Argentina And Spain Players
items.summary: FIFA opened an investigation Monday after Spain’s celebrations on beating Argentina in the World Cup final took an ugly turn when players briefly clashed on the field.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Cummins, Hazlewood, Lyon return to face Bangladesh
items.summary: Australia's veterans named in a 13-man squad with Cameron Green and Beau Webster both included
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Ex-Villa striker Duran joins seventh club aged 22
items.summary: Former Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran joins Benfica on a season-long loan from Saudi Arabian side Al-Nassr.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
